transformerconv_gnn.model¶

Classes¶

TransformerConvGNN

TransformerConv regressor for composite score prediction.

Module Contents¶

class transformerconv_gnn.model.TransformerConvGNN(input_dim: int, layer_dims: list[int], dropout: float)¶

Bases: torch.nn.Module

TransformerConv regressor for composite score prediction.

Parameters:

  • input_dim – Number of input node features.

  • layer_dims – Hidden dimensions for TransformerConv layers.

  • dropout – Dropout probability.

encoder¶
layers¶
residual_projections¶
norms¶
output_dim¶
activation¶
dropout¶
head¶
forward(x: torch.Tensor, edge_index: torch.Tensor, edge_attr: torch.Tensor) → torch.Tensor¶

Predict log composite score for each node.

Parameters:

  • x – Node feature matrix.

  • edge_index – Graph connectivity in COO format.

  • edge_attr – Edge feature matrix.

Returns:

Predicted log composite score for each node.
